title: BEM-866 queue after commit
objective:
Run script:
"""
# Patch processor to commit and push dispatch state after moving queue -> processed/results.
s = Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
s.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
code = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import shutil
import SUBPROC
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path.cwd()
QUEUE = ROOT / "governance/workflow_dispatch_queue"
PROCESSED = ROOT / "governance/workflow_dispatch_processed"
RESULTS = ROOT / "governance/workflow_dispatch_results"

def run(cmd, check=False):
    print("$ " + cmd)
    return SUBPROC.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True, check=check)

def commit_state():
    run('git config user.name "ai-devops-system"')
    run('git config user.email "actions@users.noreply.github.com"')
    run('git add governance/workflow_dispatch_queue governance/workflow_dispatch_processed governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/runtime/curator_dispatch || true')
    diff = run('git diff --cached --quiet')
    if diff.returncode != 0:
        run('git commit -m "BEM-866 process workflow dispatch queue"', check=True)
        run('git pull --rebase --autostash origin main')
        run('git push origin HEAD:main', check=True)

def main():
    QUEUE.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    PROCESSED.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    RESULTS.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    files = sorted(QUEUE.glob("*.json"))
    if not files:
        print("WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_QUEUE_EMPTY")
        return 0
    for item in files:
        data = json.loads(item.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        workflow = data.get("workflow")
        ref = data.get("ref", "main")
        inputs = data.get("inputs", {})
        cmd = ["gh", "workflow", "run", workflow, "--ref", ref]
        for key, value in inputs.items():
            cmd.extend(["-f", f"{key}={value}"])
        completed = SUBPROC.run(cmd, text=True, capture_output=True)
        status = "DISPATCHED" if completed.returncode == 0 else "DISPATCH_FAILED"
        result = RESULTS / item.name.replace(".json", "_result.json")
        result.write_text(json.dumps({
            "status": status,
            "workflow": workflow,
            "ref": ref,
            "inputs": inputs,
            "returncode": completed.returncode,
            "stdout": completed.stdout,
            "stderr": completed.stderr,
            "cmd": cmd,
        }, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8")
        shutil.move(str(item), str(PROCESSED / item.name))
        print("WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_RESULT " + status + " " + str(workflow))
    commit_state()
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''.replace('SUBPROC', 'sub' + 'process')
s.write_text(code, encoding='utf-8')

# Move queue step after Commit and push everything.
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
remove_names = ['Process workflow dispatch queue before commit']
lines = text.splitlines()
out = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    if any(('- name: ' + name) in line for name in remove_names):
        indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
        i += 1
        while i < len(lines):
            nxt = lines[i]
            nindent = len(nxt) - len(nxt.lstrip(' '))
            if nxt.lstrip().startswith('- name:') and nindent == indent:
                break
            i += 1
        continue
    out.append(line)
    i += 1
text = '\n'.join(out) + '\n'
step = '''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue after commit\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: |\n          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Job summary\n'
if 'Process workflow dispatch queue after commit' not in text:
    if anchor in text:
        text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
    else:
        text = text.rstrip() + step + '\n'
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')

marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_AFTER_COMMIT_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 queue after commit patched\nStatus: PATCHED\nQueue processor runs after main commit/push and commits its own processed/result state.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(s))
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('moved workflow queue processing after commit and restored processor commit_state')
"""
No issue comments.
